text.title: AI PM Tool Comparison 2026
text.summary: Feature comparison of major AI-augmented PM platforms with API composability matrix for agent integration.

rule.statement: Select PM tools based on API composability for agent integration, not just AI feature marketing — vendor-embedded AI (Rovo, ClickUp Autopilot) is not yet API-composable; standard CRUD via REST/GraphQL is what agents can drive.
rule.rationale: Agents need structured read/write access to sprint data. Linear GraphQL and GitHub Projects GraphQL are the most agent-friendly; Jira REST v3 covers core Agile CRUD. Rovo agents and ClickUp Autopilot workflows require significant setup and cannot be composed via API calls.

section.title: Platform Capabilities
section.p: Jira + Rovo: AI work breakdown, issue creation from chat/Confluence, workflow builder, ML risk prediction. Enterprise Agile and ITSM. API: REST v3 for standard CRUD; Rovo not API-composable.
Linear: Cycles (sprints), issues, projects, labels all queryable via GraphQL. Best API for Agile. Agent-friendly for read and write operations.
ClickUp Brain: Neural network connecting tasks, docs, chat, calendar. AI custom fields, AI Notetaker, AI Scheduler, Autopilot agents. REST API v2 exposes tasks and subtasks for agents.
Monday.com: Monday Magic (prompt to solution), monday vibe (no-code apps), Agent Factory. Predictive dashboards. API: GraphQL.
GitHub Projects: Native Agile board. Best when dev and PM tracking are unified. GraphQL API; gh CLI provides excellent agent interface.

section.title: API Composability
section.p: Agent-friendly (REST/GraphQL, full CRUD): Linear, ClickUp, GitHub Projects, Shortcut, Notion.
Partial (complex auth or limited write): Jira (standard CRUD only), Microsoft Project, Notion (limited structured query).
Not yet composable: Jira Rovo agents, ClickUp Autopilot (require UI or vendor-specific setup).

section.title: Jira Rovo Highlights
section.p: Rovo available to all customers (2026). Key features: AI work breakdown (recommends subtasks), AI work creation from Confluence pages, Workflow Builder, Virtual Service Agent (Slack/Teams), Generative AI Editor.
Rewatch acquisition adds meeting recording and AI notes. Secoda adds data enrichment. DX adds engineering intelligence metrics.

rule.statement: When using Jira API to create subtasks from AI breakdown, include "issuetype": {"name": "Subtask"} and "parent": {"key": "PROJ-X"} in the payload — missing the parent key silently creates a top-level issue.
rule.rationale: Jira REST v3 subtask creation requires explicit parent-child link format; agents frequently omit the parent field.

section.title: ClickUp AI Pricing (2025)
section.p: Free: trial access, limited automations. AI Standard: $9/user/mo, unlimited Brain MAX essentials. AI Autopilot: $28/user/mo, unlimited agents and Enterprise Search.

section.title: Industry Results
section.p: Pepsi cut low-impact work 30% with Monday.com AI agents. Five9 reduced time-to-revenue 25%. ClickUp Brain enables real-time access to ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini models.
